title: Nvidia supplier SK Hynix’s Q1 profit rises five-fold to a record high on AI boom
description: Some analysts expect the pace of price increases to ease after the second quarter

title: Musk’s xAI Eyes Triple Alliance with Mistral and Cursor to Challenge AI Coding Leaders
description: Elon Musk's xAI held talks with Mistral and Cursor for a three-way AI partnership to rival Anthropic and OpenAI in coding tools. SpaceX secured a $60 billion option to buy Cursor, fueling a compute-powered push amid internal overhauls.

title: Health System Says AI Co. Botched $32M Software Project
description: A San Francisco-based healthcare technology company failed to deliver on promises it would consolidate a Catholic health system's data under a unified platform, breaching a projected $32 million service agreement, the health system alleged in a complaint.

title: Microsoft: to invest A$25 billion in Australia by end of 2029 for AI infrastructure, security, and skills
